## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if applicable). Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`.editorconfig`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] If I added new libraries, I ran `npm run vendor:build` and verified they load locally.
- [ ] I have ensured that my changes do not make any external network requests (Zero-Backend policy).
